commands.description: RAII-based smart pointer for exclusive ownership; automatically deallocates memory when the pointer goes out of scope to prevent memory leaks.
Advanced compilation flags: -O3 for high-level optimization, -march=native to tune for the current CPU architecture, and -flto for Link Time Optimization.
